# formal_network_rule (Resource)

Creating a Network Rule in Formal.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cel_expression` (String) The CEL expression describing how this Network Rule matches and routes traffic.
- `name` (String) Network Rule name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Network Rule description.
- `status` (String) Defines the current status of the Network Rule. It can be one of the following: 'draft' or 'active'.
- `termination_protection` (Boolean) If set to true, this Network Rule cannot be deleted.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the Network Rule was created.
- `id` (String) ID of this Network Rule.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update time.
